Compress PDF

Compress PDF files to a smaller size while preserving quality. Free, open source, and self-hostable so your files never leave your infrastructure.

Open the Compress PDF tool

How it works

  1. Drop your PDF into the tool.
  2. Run the compress pdf action — no signup required.
  3. Download the result. Files stay on your infrastructure when self-hosted.

Why Stirling-PDF

  • Free and open source.
  • Self-hostable — your files never leave your network.
  • 56+ PDF tools across 5 categories.

Related tools

  • Repair PDF
  • Auto Rename
  • Extract Scans
  • Scanner Effect
Stirling-PDF — Free & Open Source
